steps.title: Use the mean formula
steps.content: The mean is the sum of the data values divided by the number of values. There are $10$ plant heights.

steps.title: Add and divide
steps.content:
Add the heights, then divide by $10$.
$$7+11+14+3+16+24+11+5+5+4=100$$
$$\frac{100}{10}=10$$
The answer is 10.
